headlines.title: Top US counterterrorism official resigns over Iran war, urging Trump to 'reverse course'
headlines.summary: National Counterterrorism Center Director Joe Kent says Trump "started this war due to pressure from Israel and its powerful American lobby".

headlines.title: Air strike hit Kabul rehab centre as patients ate dinner, survivor tells BBC
headlines.summary: The exact number killed in Monday night's strike by Pakistan is still not known, but is feared to be in the hundreds.

headlines.title: Chile's president begins building border barrier less than week into term
headlines.summary: José Antonio Kast visited the ditch - a few feet wide and deep - on Monday, calling it a "milestone".

headlines.title: Utah mother who wrote book about grief found guilty of poisoning husband
headlines.summary: A jury found that Kouri Richins killed her husband in March 2022 by poisoning him with a fentanyl-laced drink.

headlines.title: Iranian security chief Ali Larijani killed in air strike
headlines.summary: His death is confirmed on state TV, alongside that of another senior figure, Gholamreza Soleimani.

headlines.title: LIVE: Trump lashes out at Nato allies saying US 'no longer needs' help with Iran war
headlines.summary: The US president's comments come after a growing list of nations, including many European powers, turned down his request to help protect the Strait of Hormuz.

headlines.title: Pakistan air strike kills at least 100 at Kabul drug rehab centre
headlines.summary: Some of the bodies were injured beyond recognition, forensic laboratory sources told the BBC.

headlines.title: Water supply cut in Moldova after oil spill blamed on Russian strike in Ukraine
headlines.summary: Moldova has imposed a 15-day state of alert in the Dniester river basin as a precaution.

headlines.title: Aspiring female Zambian politicians were asked for sexual favours, official says
headlines.summary: These reports harm attempts to close the wide gender representation gap in Zambia, activists say.

headlines.title: Trump says presidents 'should not have learning disabilities' as he mocks Newsom's dyslexia
headlines.summary: The National Center for Learning Disabilities said it was "disturbed" by the president's remarks.

headlines.title: LIVE: Scotland's assisted dying bill fails to pass in final vote
headlines.summary: Members of the Scottish Parliament vote 69 to 57 against the proposed legislation after hours of emotional debate.

headlines.title: 'Explosive' meningitis outbreak unprecedented – officials
headlines.summary: Officials confirm 15 cases of meningitis following an outbreak in Kent, in which two people died.

headlines.title: Inquiry shown CCTV of triple killer kicking officer
headlines.summary: Footage of Valdo Calocane attacking officers is played at the public inquiry into his killings.

headlines.title: Prince William joins Greg James on Comic Relief bike ride
headlines.summary: The Radio 1 Breakfast host was joined by a special guest on the latest leg of his charity challenge.

headlines.title: Was response to 'unprecedented' outbreak too slow?
headlines.summary: Questions are being asked about whether the NHS and authorities should have raised the alarm sooner.

headlines.title: Iran and Russia are 'brothers in hatred', Zelensky tells MPs
headlines.summary: The president highlights how Tehran is selling drones to Moscow that have been used against Ukraine.

headlines.title: Man dead in wheelie bin was a 'pillar of strength'
headlines.summary: The body found at Cash's Park in Coventry is that of 37-year-old Thomas Niven, police have confirmed.

headlines.title: Greyhound racing to be banned in Wales after Senedd vote
headlines.summary: But the legislation faces a legal challenge and accusations ministers did not consult properly.

headlines.title: Mayors to gain more spending power under Reeves tax plans
headlines.summary: The chancellor sets out the government's plan for economic growth, which also includes closer ties to the EU.

headlines.title: Dates confirmed for new driving test booking rules
headlines.summary: Only learners will be able to book a car driving test under new rules to make the system fairer.
